description: DecisionMatch represents the decision match detail of activating the remedy system.

clusterConditionMatch.description: ClusterConditionRequirement describes the Cluster condition requirement details.

conditionStatus.description: ConditionStatus specifies the ClusterStatue condition status.

conditionType.description: ConditionType specifies the ClusterStatus condition type.

operator.description: Operator represents a conditionType's relationship to a conditionStatus. Valid operators are Equal, NotEqual.
